name: Can I get workers comp if my coworker caused my injury in Saint George?
description: Yes, no-fault regardless of coworker fault.[1]

mainEntity.name: Can I get workers comp if my coworker caused my injury in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, no-fault regardless of coworker fault.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, no-fault covers coworker negligence; comp handles it.[1][2] Sue coworker only if intentional.[3] Key factors: Work-related = covered. Practical guidance: Report fully, don't blame publicly; third-party if outsider. Comp first.
